item.title: Chipotle CEO allegedly suggests company would keep raising prices and 'lean into' customers making over $100K
item.description: Chipotle CEO allegedly suggested targeting customers earning over $100,000 per year in leaked audio, sparking controversy over potential price hikes.

item.title: Beef prices in focus as Trump signs order aimed at consumer relief
item.description: President Trump signed an executive order to boost beef imports from Argentina in a move that aims to lower soaring ground beef and steak prices for c...

item.title: Super Bowl LX players lose thousands to California's 'jock tax' on athlete income
item.description: Players competing in Super Bowl LX in Santa Clara will face California's jock tax, which subjects players to taxes for days spent in the state prepari...

item.title: Why medals at the 2026 Winter Olympics are worth more than ever
item.description: Gold and silver prices are soaring to new highs, driving 2026 Winter Olympics medal values to historic levels during the Milan Cortina games.

item.title: Mortgage rates tick higher but remain near 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage rose this week to 6.11%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is up from last...
